name: EuiLoadingSpinner
visualDescription: A circular ring (~16–40px diameter) that rotates continuously. The ring has a transparent gap that creates the spinning animation effect. Color matches the current theme's primary or subdued palette. NOT EuiLoadingElastic (which shows the animated Elastic logo, not a plain ring). NOT EuiProgress (which is a horizontal bar).

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.
